/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -W -Wall -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libBACSMonitor.dylib -install_name @rpath/libBACSMonitor.dylib CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/modules/src/MongoDBClient.cc.o CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/modules/src/ReceiveTelemetry.cc.o CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/modules/src/InterpretTelemetry.cc.o CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/modules/src/PushToMongoDB.cc.o CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/core/src/TelemetryDefinition.cc.o CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/core/src/CRC16.cc.o CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/core/src/DateManager.cc.o CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/core/src/ErrorManager.cc.o CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/modules/src/SocketTransceiver.cc.o CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/core/src/SerialCommunication.cc.o CMakeFiles/BACSMonitor.dir/Users/syn/balloon/onboard/source/core/src/CommandDefinition.cc.o   -L/Users/syn/ANLNext/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/syn/ANLNext/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/syn/lib -lANLNext /Users/syn/lib/libHSQuickLookAnalyzer.dylib -lmongocxx -lbsoncxx
